# Simple workflow for deploying static content to GitHub Pages name: Deploy static content to Pages on: # Runs on pushes targeting the default branch push: branches: ["main"] # Allows you to run this workflow manually from the Actions tab workflow_dispatch: # Sets permissions of the GITHUB_TOKEN to allow deployment to GitHub Pages permissions: contents: read pages: write id-token: write # Allow only one concurrent deployment, skipping runs queued between the run in-progress and latest queued. # However, do NOT cancel in-progress runs as we want to allow these production deployments to complete. concurrency: group: "pages" cancel-in-progress: false jobs: AutoSellr — AI-Powered Dropshipping Automation

Features

Everything you need to run a
7-figure dropshipping store

AutoSellr combines powerful AI with battle-tested eCommerce automation, so you can scale without the grind.

🔍

AI Product Research

Our AI scans millions of products daily, spotting trending items before they blow up. Get a curated feed of winning products with margin analysis and competition scores.

🏗️

AI Store Builder

Instantly generate complete product pages with AI-written descriptions, optimized titles, SEO metadata, and professional imagery — ready to publish in one click.

📢

AI Ad & Marketing Automation

AutoSellr writes ad copy, designs creatives, launches campaigns on Meta & TikTok, and continuously A/B tests for peak ROAS — all without manual input.

💬

AI Customer Support

A 24/7 AI agent handles order tracking, FAQs, refunds, and escalations. Reduce support tickets by up to 80% and keep customers happy automatically.

📊

Smart Analytics Dashboard

Real-time insights into revenue, ad spend, best-selling products, and customer LTV. Make smarter decisions backed by AI-driven recommendations.

How It Works

From zero to live store
in five simple steps

No technical skills needed. AutoSellr handles the complexity so you can launch your business today.

1
🚀

Sign Up for Free

Create your AutoSellr account in under 60 seconds. No credit card required to start your 14-day trial and explore the full platform.

2
🔗

Connect Your Store

Link your Shopify, WooCommerce, or BigCommerce store with one click. AutoSellr syncs instantly and is ready to work within minutes.

3
🤖

AI Finds Winning Products

Our AI engine analyzes trends, margins, competition, and demand signals to surface the best products for your niche and target market.

4
📦

Import Products Instantly

Select products and import them with AI-generated descriptions, optimized pricing, and professional images ready for your storefront.

5
📣

Launch Ads & Scale

AutoSellr creates and launches your first ad campaigns automatically. Watch your sales grow while the AI continuously optimizes performance.

Pricing

Simple, transparent pricing
that scales with you

Start free, upgrade when you're ready. No hidden fees, no long-term contracts.

$29/mo
Perfect for launching your first store.

  • 50 AI product discoveries/mo
  • AI-generated product pages
  • Basic analytics dashboard
  • Email support

$79/mo

FAQ

Frequently asked questions

Everything you need to know before getting started.

Do I need technical skills to use AutoSellr? +
Not at all. AutoSellr is designed for non-technical entrepreneurs. If you can click a button, you can run a profitable dropshipping store. Our setup wizard guides you through every step in under 10 minutes.
Which eCommerce platforms does AutoSellr support? +
AutoSellr integrates natively with Shopify, WooCommerce, BigCommerce, and Wix. We're actively adding more platforms. You can also use our standalone storefront builder if you're starting from scratch.
Where do the products come from? +
AutoSellr sources products from a curated network of vetted suppliers on AliExpress, CJ Dropshipping, Zendrop, and others. All suppliers are reviewed for reliability, shipping speed, and product quality before being included in our catalog.
How does the AI ad automation work? +
Once you connect your Meta or TikTok ad account, AutoSellr's AI generates ad creatives, writes copy, sets targeting parameters, and launches campaigns on your behalf. It then monitors performance in real time, automatically pausing underperforming ads and scaling winners.
Is there a free trial? Can I cancel anytime? +
Yes — every plan comes with a 14-day free trial, no credit card required. You can cancel your subscription at any time from your account dashboard with zero cancellation fees. We believe in earning your business every month.
How does AutoSellr compare to other dropshipping tools? +
Most tools offer one piece of the puzzle — product research OR store building OR marketing. AutoSellr is an all-in-one AI platform that handles the entire operation end-to-end, so you don't need to stitch together 5 different subscriptions to run your business.
🚀 Start Today — No Credit Card Required

# Single deploy job since we're just deploying deploy: environment: name: github-pages url: ${{ steps.deployment.outputs.page_url }} runs-on: ubuntu-latest steps: - name: Checkout uses: actions/checkout@v4 - name: Setup Pages uses: actions/configure-pages@v5 - name: Upload artifact uses: actions/upload-pages-artifact@v3 with: # Upload entire repository path: '.' - name: Deploy to GitHub Pages id: deployment uses: actions/deploy-pages@v4
